twistermill.ponder.windroto_ponder.title: Twistermill Bearing
twistermill.ponder.windroto_ponder.heade: Generate rotational power with the Twistermill Bearing
twistermill.ponder.windroto_ponder.text_: Twistermill Bearings provide dynamic RPM capacity thanks to wind power
The rotation direction can be set via the movement mode.
The larger wind turbines are built, the more energy they can produce.

Twistermill Bearings connect to the blocks placed on top. 
Blocks of a wind turbine must be glued together. 
Sails do not require glue.
When there is no wind, overstress can occur. A clutch can disengage at low RPM and re-engage when enough wind is available.

Redstone Comparator: 
The signal strength depends on RPM. 
If the wind turbine rotates too slowly, the signal drops to strength 0
Redstone input signals 1-14 activate the brake, while strength 15 brings the wind turbine to a complete stop.
Individual values or summaries can be sent to Create displays.
twistermill.ponder.windvane_ponder.title: Wind Vane Bearing
twistermill.ponder.windvane_ponder.heade: Use the Wind Vane Bearing as a wind tracking controller
twistermill.ponder.windvane_ponder.text_: Wind Vane bearings align themselves according to the wind direction.

Wind Vane bearings connect to the blocks placed on top. 
Blocks of a Wind Vane controller must be glued together. 
Sails do not require glue.
Look at a Wind Vane bearing while holding a compass in your left hand and obsidian in your right hand.
Obsidian must be placed on the north side of the Wind Vane bearing and serves as the zero-point reference.

A redstone pulse activates Park Mode, causing the bearing to align north / 0°. 
A second pulse deactivates Park Mode. 

(Create Interactive build mode)
Individual values or summaries can be sent to Create displays.
twistermill.ponder.servo_ponder.title: Angle Servo
twistermill.ponder.servo_ponder.header: Use the Angle Servo as a blade pitch controller.
twistermill.ponder.servo_ponder.text_1:
Angle Servos can rotate the rotor blades of wind turbines to improve efficiency.

Only if Create Interactive is installed.
twistermill.ponder.servo_ponder.text_2:
Angle Servo configurations:

Rotation speed:
Signal strength 1-15

Mode selection:
Signal strength 1-9

Angle steps:
Signal strength 1-15
twistermill.ponder.servo_ponder.text_3: Individual values or summaries can be sent to Create displays.
twistermill.ponder.servo_ponder.text_4:
Angle Servo bearings connect to the blocks placed on top. 
Blocks of a wind direction controller must be glued together. 
Sails do not require glue.
twistermill.ponder.servo_ponder.text_5:
CREATE INTERACTIVE: 

For maximum efficiency, use the Binding Stick by right-clicking the Twistermill Bearing first and then the Servo to connect the components.
twistermill.ponder.invservo_ponder.title: Inverted Angle Servo
twistermill.ponder.invservo_ponder.heade: Use the Inverted Angle Servo as a blade pitch controller
twistermill.ponder.invservo_ponder.text_:
Inverted Angle Servos can rotate the rotor blades of wind turbines to improve efficiency.

Only if Create Interactive is installed.

Inverted Angle Servo configurations:

Rotation speed:
Signal strength 1-15

Mode selection:
Signal strength 1-9

Angle steps:
Signal strength 1-15
Individual values or summaries can be sent to Create displays.

Inverted Angle Servos connect to the blocks placed on top. 
Blocks of a wind direction controller must be glued together. 
Sails do not require glue.

CREATE INTERACTIVE: 

For maximum efficiency, use the Binding Stick by right-clicking the Twistermill Bearing first and then the Inverted Servo to connect the components.
item.twistermill.binding_stick.tooltip.s: Links servos to a Twistermill bearing.
item.twistermill.binding_stick.tooltip.b: Right-click a Twistermill bearing to activate binding mode. Then right-click a servo to link it.
Shift + right-click resets binding mode and clears existing bearing-servo links.
block.twistermill.twister_sail_frame_blo: A customizable sail frame. Sneak with supported wood blocks to change the frame material.
block.twistermill.twister_sail_block.too: A TwisterMill sail with a customizable frame and dyeable canvas. Use dyes without sneaking to recolor the sail.
